scenario: short technical warm-up before the quiet-control attempt
objective: confirm that the path is stable before the optional quiet-window run
instructions: Confirm that D01 has already been completed and saved.;;Stay outside the controlled path between AP and capture node.;;If the path looks unstable or the background is not honestly quieter, stop and do not claim L0.

scenario: longer empty baseline under the quietest honestly available condition
objective: capture a stronger empty control segment under the quietest background that can be honestly defended
instructions: Leave the controlled 2.00 m path between AP and capture node.;;If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.;;Keep the room layout unchanged and minimize nearby human activity.

scenario: static presence under the same quiet-control attempt
objective: capture one static-presence segment under the same quiet-control condition
instructions: Enter the midpoint of the controlled path between AP and capture node.;;Stand almost still with a natural posture.;;Do not touch the chair, AP node, table, or cables.

scenario: slow motion under the same quiet-control attempt
objective: capture one slow-motion segment under the same quiet-control condition
instructions: Stay within the same controlled path between AP and capture node.;;Move slowly back and forth without leaving the corridor.;;Do not change the topology of the stand.

scenario: final empty recovery under the same quiet-control attempt
objective: finish the run with a second long empty reference under the same quiet-control condition
instructions: Leave the controlled path one final time.;;If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.;;Keep the room layout unchanged until the capture is stopped.
